peer_group: 医药生物-医疗器械-高端医械与医疗器械平台
analyst_response: Accepted. Mindray is the broadest A-share medical-device platform; short-term procurement or policy pressure should be risk-tagged rather than used as a rejection reason.
calibrated_standard_implication: Core medical-device platform watch requires product breadth hospital validation installed base service network global channel and continuous product iteration.

peer_group: 医药生物-医疗器械-高端医械与医疗器械平台
analyst_response: Accepted. United Imaging has a distinct high-end imaging platform that Mindray does not comprehensively cover.
calibrated_standard_implication: High-end imaging leaders can be retained alongside broad device platforms when the equipment category and clinical validation path are meaningfully different.

peer_group: 医药生物-医疗器械-高端医械与医疗器械平台
analyst_response: Accepted. Electrophysiology and vascular-intervention consumables are a distinct high-value clinical niche with doctor adoption and recurring procedure demand.
calibrated_standard_implication: Specialized high-value device leaders can be retained when their treatment pathway and doctor adoption are not covered by retained broad platforms.

peer_group: 医药生物-医疗器械-高端医械与医疗器械平台
reviewer_or_inferred_reason: Reviewer asked analyst to decide for less familiar companies using the differentiated-peer principle.
analyst_response: Retain. Aortic and peripheral vascular intervention is a specialized high-value device niche distinct from Mindray United Imaging and Apt Medical; current evidence shows growth cash flow and clinical/product specialization.
calibrated_standard_implication: Keep specialized intervention-device companies when their clinical niche is hard to replace and not comprehensively dominated by retained peers.

peer_group: 医药生物-医疗器械-高端医械与医疗器械平台
reviewer_or_inferred_reason: Reviewer asked analyst to decide for less familiar companies using the differentiated-peer principle.
analyst_response: Retain. Endoscopic diagnosis-and-treatment consumables have recurring procedure demand doctor usage habits and a different clinical workflow from retained equipment platforms.
calibrated_standard_implication: Keep specialized consumable leaders when the procedure workflow creates durable adoption and the retained platforms do not cover the same advantage.

peer_group: 医药生物-医疗器械-高端医械与医疗器械平台

calibrated_standard_implication: Reject companies whose main product lines are either covered by retained platforms or still lack clear leadership versus global incumbents.

analyst_response: Reject for this round. Chemiluminescence IVD has an installed-base/reagent model but overlaps with Mindray IVD and faces policy and competition pressure; current evidence does not prove enough irreplaceable differentiation.
